hypothesis: Mapping Dynamic Annealing/Hybrid Blending to Algorithm Switching:** We can utilize a "Hybrid Blending" mechanism to switch between sorting strategies based on a runtime threshold (functionally similar to the $p$ parameter in SHOR-PSRO). For instance, the system can seamlessly transition to Insertion Sort for small block sizes while deploying SIMD-optimized Quicksort or Radix sort for larger contiguous chunks.
